description: baseline: pipelined DMA + cached alloc + memset prefault
exp1: overlap memset pre-fault with upload DMA in background thread
exp2: download chunk size 4MB→32MB
exp3: dual interleaved upload (keys+payload on separate streams) — regression +7.3%
exp4: compact keys to comparison_size before upload — CPU compaction too expensive (+47.8%)
exp5: direct pinned DMA upload (cudaHostRegister source blocks, skip staging copy)
exp6: direct pinned download (cudaHostRegister output, skip staging copy)
exp7: remove memset pre-fault (regression — page faults during download +26%)
exp8: pre-pin output buffer in background thread (memset+cudaHostRegister before download)
exp9: two-stream interleaved pin+DMA upload (overlap pin of next with DMA of current)
exp10: cudaHostRegisterReadOnly — no effect on Turing
exp11: overlap sort with payload upload (PCIe contention negates sort overlap, +complexity)
exp12: bg thread for cudaMalloc+prefault (CUDA context contention +44%)
exp13: plain cudaMemcpy (pageable, no pin) — regression +40%
exp14: madvise(MADV_SEQUENTIAL) on source blocks before pin
exp15: CPU-side gather (permutation-only GPU sort) — random gather 3s+
exp16: split prefault (memset-only bg, pin sequential) — CUDA lock cost is fixed, just shifts around
exp17: batch pin upfront → DMA → unpin — total pin cost dominates (+33%)
exp18: chunked pipelined upload (128MB staging) — memcpy to pinned staging ~3 GB/s (+15%)
exp19: pin output during GPU sort overlap — net-neutral, CUDA lock between sort+pin
exp20: compact key upload (MT CPU compact + DMA) — CPU compact cost ≈ PCIe savings
exp21: key-only GPU sort + 16-thread CPU gather — random gather 1.1s even with pre-fault+MT
exp22: skip per-thread sort (gpu_skip_sort) — saves 47% CPU but gather regression on low-cardinality keys
exp23: wall-clock comparison — GPU 0.92x (8% SLOWER than CPU in total query time). Previous 3.8x was operator-only vs total-query
exp24: sink instrumentation — sink_cpu=35s combine=30s (65s cumulative). Sort in AddLocalState dominates combine phase
exp25: multi-block output (16 blocks for parallel source) — 16× cudaHostRegister calls cause +520ms pin regression
exp26: split-after-download (single DMA + memcpy to 16 blocks) — 1.1s memcpy+page-fault overhead negates source parallelization
exp27: compact key upload (entry→cmp stride, hugepage mmap) + skip presort (default on). Wall-clock 1.02-1.06x GPU FASTER than CPU. Compact saves DMA, skip-presort saves sink combine time.
